behavior_summary: Provides an area-based projectile/shooter system: when an actor enters a trigger region, U8P_SHOOTER::enterFastArea creates one or more projectile items, places them around the source, plays SFX, and spawns a per-projectile process (U8P_SHOOTER::0080) for each projectile.

Each spawned U8P_SHOOTER::0080 process repeatedly advances its projectile by computing a new target WorldPoint (adding scaled dx/dy steps), testing that point with Item::legal_move, and either spawning a FIRESPEL effect or destroying the projectile when movement is invalid. The process yields/suspends between advancement steps.
U8P_SHOOTER::leaveFastArea performs cleanup when an actor leaves the trigger region by setting process info/exclude and calling a cleanup helper (FREE::2A56).
notable_control_flow: U8P_SHOOTER::enterFastArea: reads source item frame and quality to determine how many and which directions of projectiles to create, conditionally gates creation with FREE::* utilities, creates items, pops them into world coordinates derived from source X/Y/Z plus mapped offsets, plays a sound, and spawns U8P_SHOOTER::0080 for each projectile.

U8P_SHOOTER::0080: on start marks process/info state, samples item X/Y/Z, suspends (yields) to run over time, then on resume computes destination by adding dx*scale and dy*scale, calls Item::legal_move and branches: if legal and state permits it spawns FIRESPEL::233D (and may invoke FREE::1A85 checks) and continues; otherwise it calls Item::destroy and ends.
U8P_SHOOTER::leaveFastArea: marks info/process exclusion and calls FREE::2A56 to free area-related state.
open_questions: Exact semantics and return values of FREE::1A85, FREE::1C19, FREE::1D62 and how they influence spawn counts and effect gating (these are inferred utility/random/guard routines).
Precise meaning of the local flag [BP-04h] used in U8P_SHOOTER::0080 and its comparison to constant 0x22 (how it alters firing vs destruction behavior).
Whether FIRESPEL::1FE4 and FIRESPEL::233D apply damage, only visuals, or both; their exact parameter contract beyond being spawned with a source, direction, and optional flags.
Any global flags or game-state variables outside the script that this area triggers or depends on (no global read/writes were found in the canonical extraction).

main_function.name: U8P_SHOOTER::0080
main_function.purpose: Per-projectile process that advances a spawned projectile over time: sample item position, yield to advance over multiple frames, compute and test a stepped destination using dx/dy multipliers, and either spawn a fire-spell effect or destroy the projectile based on legality and local state.
entry_conditions: Spawned (via spawn) by U8P_SHOOTER::enterFastArea when projectiles are created
Resumes repeatedly after suspend/yield to advance the projectile over time
Runs while its item exists and uses Item::legal_move to determine whether to continue or terminate

function_map.name: U8P_SHOOTER::0080
function_map.role: Per-projectile motion controller; loops with suspend to move a projectile, tests legal movement, spawns FIRESPEL effects or destroys item.

function_map.name: U8P_SHOOTER::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Trigger handler for entering the area: determines quantity/directions from source frame/quality, creates and places projectile items, plays SFX, and spawns U8P_SHOOTER::0080 processes (also may spawn immediate FIRESPEL effects).

function_map.name: U8P_SHOOTER::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Trigger handler for leaving the area: marks process info/exclude and calls FREE::2A56 to clean up/free area-related state.

internal_calls.purpose: Spawn a per-projectile process to control each created projectile item.

external_calls.purpose: Sample the projectile's current world coordinates to compute next movement/pop positions.
Check whether the computed destination WorldPoint is a legal location; return controls spawning FIRESPEL or destroying the projectile.
Spawn a fire-spell visual/attack effect when movement is allowed or on trigger conditions.
Destroy the projectile when movement is invalid or the projectile's lifecycle ends.
Read source item frame to map into projectile direction patterns (dx/dy).
Read source item quality to scale how many projectiles to attempt to create.
Create new projectile item instances before placing/popping them into the world.
Place created projectile items at computed X,Y,Z offsets from the source.
Play a sound effect when a projectile is popped/created.
Compute direction from source to target for aiming FIRESPEL::1FE4 when applicable.
Optionally spawn an immediate targeted fire-spell effect during area-entry processing.
Utility/random/gating functions used to adjust spawn counts and to decide whether to spawn certain effects or projectiles; semantics are inferred.
Cleanup/free routine for area-related state invoked on leaving the area.
Called as part of an effect/spawn gating check inside the projectile process before spawning FIRESPEL::233D (inferred gating/randomization).
Spawn FIRESPEL::233D subprocesses and potentially other helper subprocesses during projectile lifecycle.
Yield the projectile process so motion advances over multiple frames/ticks.

writes.name: process info (set info)
writes.likely_effect: Mark item/process state for the area or projectile so the engine knows it is being processed/managed by this script.

writes.name: process exclude
writes.likely_effect: Temporarily exclude the triggering item/process from concurrent handling while enter/leave handlers or projectile processes operate.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides an area-based projectile/shooter system: when an actor enters a trigger region, U8P_SHOOTER::enterFastArea creates one or more projectile items, places them around the source, plays SFX, and spawns a per-projectile process (U8P_SHOOTER::0080) for each projectile.
